title: Reconnect or retire Google Drive rclone mount
goal: Repair the expired/revoked gdrive OAuth remote or explicitly retire the Google Drive mount path while preserving the no-restart-loop behavior established during the audit.

acceptance.assertion: rclone-gdrive.service does not enter a rapid restart loop when Google auth is invalid.
If Google Drive remains desired, `rclone config reconnect gdrive:` is completed by the user and a mount smoke proves /home/alex/GDrive is a real rclone mount.
If Google Drive is retired, references to /home/alex/GDrive in active operator paths are either removed or documented as historical.

metadata.live_audit_finding: gdrive OAuth invalid_grant; service stopped and disabled on 2026-07-08.
